Reformat constant string assignments to single lines for consistency.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard Java coding conventions.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard Java coding conventions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the Generated annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or deprecated in newer Jakarta EE versions; using it causes compilation errors or classpath conflicts when targeting Jakarta EE 9+ (which is standard for Spring Boot 3 / JDK 17+ migrations).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; using javax causes compile errors or missing class runtime failures.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Use text blocks for multi-line log message formatting to improve readability.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles to ensure meaningful log output.
Add JHipster generator needle comments to the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in array syntax for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Replace the Hibernate 5 Jackson module with its Jakarta EE namespace equivalent to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate5.Hibernate5Module does not exist in the Jakarta-compatible version of the library; using it causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the current configuration.

Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource provider after standard properties, likely to align with Spring Boot 3.x auto-configuration expectations or resolve bean definition conflicts.
Replace the deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to match the updated Spring Boot Liquibase API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in newer Spring Boot versions; using it causes a compile error or runtime failure due to missing method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent builder methods to lambda DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old fluent API (e.g., .authorizeRequests(), .headers()) is removed in Spring Security 6; code using it will not compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to use the new RequestMatcher API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy to align with modern browser security headers and Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler with a lambda setting HTTP 200 status.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom handlers were removed in favor of simpler status-based responses in the new configuration style.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler with a lambda setting HTTP 401 status.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom handlers were removed in favor of simpler status-based responses in the new configuration style.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler with HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom handlers were removed in favor of standard Spring Security handlers in the new configuration style.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport entry point with HttpStatusEntryPoint for API requests.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom problem support integration was refactored out of the core security configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity configuration for ignoring static resources, moving them to permitAll in HttpSecurity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurity ignoring is often redundant when resources are permitted in the filter chain; simplifies configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix CSRF token retrieval in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Security 6 changed how CSRF tokens are stored in the request, requiring explicit handler configuration for compatibility.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add SpaWebFilter and CookieCsrfFilter to handle SPA-specific security requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These filters are part of the JHipster-specific security implementation for SPAs.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Content-Security-Policy to use dynamic configuration from JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Aligns with JHipster's configuration-driven security policy approach.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update frameOptions to sameOrigin to allow H2 console and other same-origin frames.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Deny policy breaks H2 console and other same-origin resources; sameOrigin is more permissive for development.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add permitAll rules for static assets and Swagger UI in authorization configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These resources need to be accessible without authentication for the application to function correctly.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add authorization rule for /v3/api-docs/** requiring ADMIN authority.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Secures OpenAPI documentation endpoints.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove CorsFilter injection and configuration from SecurityConfiguration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CORS configuration is typically handled separately in Spring Boot 3.x via WebMvcConfigurer or properties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove SecurityProblemSupport injection and configuration from SecurityConfiguration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Problem support is handled via global exception handlers rather than security entry points.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler bean definition.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Replaced by inline lambda in formLogin configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler bean definition.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Replaced by inline lambda in formLogin configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler bean definition.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Replaced by HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler in logout configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Configuration annotation to SecurityConfiguration class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Required for Spring to recognize the class as a configuration source when not extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove @Import(SecurityProblemSupport.class) annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SecurityProblemSupport is no longer imported or used in this configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update constructor to remove CorsFilter and SecurityProblemSupport parameters.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These dependencies are no longer used in the security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(..., CorsFilter corsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to deprecated Spring Security classes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Clean up imports that are no longer used after migration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new imports for Spring Security 6 classes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Required for the new SecurityFilterChain and lambda DSL configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor static resource location and path mappings to use a more granular and modern configuration strategy.
Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors.

Remove unused import for MediaType.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly instead of catching UnsupportedEncodingException.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins.
Remove registration of deprecated Swagger v2 API docs endpoint.
Remove registration of deprecated Swagger resources endpoint.
